design_language.aesthetic: High-energy, bold, and youthful. It utilizes a 'collage' aesthetic that mixes high-quality food photography with flat, 2D graphic elements like starbursts, tape stickers, and checkerboard patterns.
design_language.mood: Exciting, affordable, accessible, and fun. It avoids the 'premium/luxury' food look in favor of a 'street food/quick bite' vibe.
design_language.visual_approach: Framed content. Most ads use a solid dark background or a pink border to frame a central 'stage' where the food is presented against a checkerboard pattern.

color_logic.primary_background: Deep Forest Green (#004d00 approx) - Used as the base canvas. Suggests freshness but also serves as a high-contrast backdrop for the neon accents.
color_logic.pattern_background: Dark/Light Green Checkerboard - Used inside the main content area. Adds texture, depth, and a retro gaming/90s vibe.
color_logic.accent_color_1: Hot Pink / Magenta (#ff00cc approx) - Used for borders, the logo, and header bars. Creates a vibrating contrast against the green. Signals energy and youth.
color_logic.accent_color_2: Lime Green / Neon Green (#ccff00 approx) - Used for starbursts, sticker backgrounds, and highlight text. Signals 'freshness', 'go', and draws the eye to key details.
color_logic.text_color: White (for main headlines on dark backgrounds) and Black (for text on lime green stickers).
color_logic.color_psychology: The Green/Pink/Lime triad is unusual for food (which usually uses Red/Orange/Yellow). This distinct palette makes the brand instantly recognizable and separates it from traditional competitors.

typography.logo_font: Custom, lowercase, italicized, bold sans-serif with a futuristic/tech feel. The underline suggests speed or movement.
typography.headline_font: Bold, condensed sans-serif (likely Impact or similar). All caps for authority and readability. Used for the 'Guarantees' and 'Offers'.
typography.sticker_font: Handwritten / Marker style (e.g., Permanent Marker font). Adds a human, informal, 'street' touch. Used for taglines.
typography.hierarchy: Logo -> Main Promise ('Lowest Price' / 'Free Delivery') -> Food Image -> Informal Tagline (Sticker).

graphic_elements.framing: Thick hot pink borders or rounded rectangles surrounding the main content area.
graphic_elements.starburst: Lime green explosion shape with pink outline. A recurring motif used to highlight the product or add dynamic energy behind the food.
graphic_elements.stickers: Rectangular lime green shapes with slight rotation and drop shadows, resembling sticky notes, tape labels, or price tags.
graphic_elements.dotted_lines: Used in Ad 5 to circle the plate, adding a 'cutout' or 'scrapbook' feel.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Center/Bottom. A white bowl dominates the lower half. Chopsticks lifting noodles creates a vertical line drawing the eye up.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top Left: Brand logo and main headline ('Lowest price guaranteed...'). Bottom Right: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Large starburst behind the left side of the bowl. Small pink geometric shards near the chopsticks.

ads.message_delivery: Focuses on the action of eating ('Slurps up') vs. the financial benefit ('costs down'). The vertical lift of the noodles suggests abundance.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Right-aligned. A whole pizza with a hand pulling a slice from the right edge. The cheese pull adds dynamic movement.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Left Center: Large bold text ('FREE DELIVERY...'). Bottom Right: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst behind the bottom left of the pizza. Pink border frames the whole image.

ads.message_delivery: Split composition. Left side is rational (text about fees), Right side is emotional (appetizing pizza). Balances logic and desire.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Center. Two hands holding a large burger. The hands frame the product, emphasizing portion size and making it feel personal/tactile.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top Center: Logo. Below Logo: Offer text ('Free Delivery...'). Left Middle: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst behind the burger. Pink border frames the whole image.

ads.message_delivery: The hands imply 'grab and go'. The text is centered for mobile readability. Connects 'Great Burgers' directly to 'Great Value'.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Center. Similar to Ad 2 but cropped for vertical. The hand pulling the slice is prominent.
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top Center: Logo. Below Logo: Offer text. Bottom Center: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst on the left. Pink border frames the whole image.

ads.message_delivery: Reiteration of the 'Free Delivery' offer. The vertical format optimizes the pizza image to fill the screen width.

layout_specifics.image_placement: Center. A wooden plate with Dosa and chutneys. Top-down view (flat lay).
layout_specifics.text_placement: Top Header: White text on a solid Pink bar ('LOWEST PRICE GUARANTEED...'). Bottom Left: Logo. Bottom Right: Sticker tagline.
layout_specifics.graphic_placement: Starburst top left. Dotted white line circling the plate.

ads.message_delivery: The pink header bar acts as a 'banner' announcement. The wooden plate and banana leaf suggest authenticity/tradition, while the graphics keep it modern.

strategic_summary.visual_hook: The neon green and hot pink against dark green is a unique 'ownable asset'. It stands out in a feed dominated by red/orange food ads (like Swiggy/Zomato).
strategic_summary.value_proposition: The design screams 'Discount' without looking 'Cheap'. The retro-pop style makes the low price feel like a cool trend rather than a clearance sale.
strategic_summary.consistency: Highly templated. The checkerboard background, the pink borders, the starburst, and the 'tape sticker' placement are consistent across all formats, building strong brand recognition.
strategic_summary.photography_style: Food is shot brightly with high saturation. Often includes human elements (hands, chopsticks) to add scale and relatability.
